sections.paragraph:
Original: תּשׁיּה תּוּשׁיּה

Transliteration: tûshı̂yâh tûshı̂yâh

Phonetic: too-shee-yaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. wisdom, sound knowledge, success, sound or efficient wisdom, abiding success
    1. sound or efficient wisdom
    2. abiding success (of the effect of sound wisdom)

Origin: from an unused root probably meaning to substantiate

TWOT entry: 923a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
